description.p: A small cross-platform desktop client that reports Elite Dangerous colonization progress to ravencolonial.com by tailing your game journal in the background. Built primarily for Linux, where SrvSurvey is not available.
It can also relay journal events to the community trackers:

ul.li: ravencolonial.com — colonization depot snapshots, contributions, and Fleet Carrier cargo sync.
EDDN — anonymous journal and commodity-market messages.
Inara — typed location, dock, and carrier-jump events plus pilot ranks.

description.p: Scope is intentionally narrow: colonization reporting only. No exploration overlays, no SRV survey tooling.

screenshot.caption: The Projects tab showing outstanding colonization commodities

description.p: Alpha: core colonization reporting, Fleet Carrier cargo sync, and EDDN/EDSM/Inara uploads.
